title: verbascum × amaliense
intro: Verbascum × amaliense, also known as Ameli's Mullein, is a hybrid perennial plant species within the Verbascum genus, known for its large, pale yellow flowers and robust growth. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × amaliense include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
